params.name: Family Reunion
params.description:
On Oct 30, 1867 AD, Bazille created this classic work.
Family Reunion is one of the representative works of the French painter Bazille. In this work, he portrays a group of figures in a garden setting, using a delicate balance of light, shadow, and color to create a tranquil and harmonious effect. Unfortunately, Bazille died young in the Franco-Prussian War, cutting short his promising artistic career.
